name: MAC-10 | 狂蟒之灾
descriptionEn: Essentially a box that bullets come out of, the MAC-10 SMG boasts a high rate of fire, with poor spread accuracy and high recoil as trade-offs. It has been custom painted with a bronze snakeskin pattern and a coiled snake beneath the wire form butt. The hissing is bullets flying past you
descriptionZh: 本质上就是个能射出子弹的盒子，MAC-10 微型冲锋枪拥有高频率的射速，作为交换，它还拥有略逊一筹的精准度和高后坐力。 这把武器采用了古铜色的蛇皮图案以及进行涂装，缠绕的蛇身形成枪托底部。 不是一枚被遗弃的弹壳，而是一颗永远飞行的子弹。
